name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, bounded Ground Route Authority, 0.1.638 inventory-deposit crash safety, 0.1.639 stale supply-writ satisfaction clearing, 0.1.640 infrastructure-first behavior gating, and 0.1.641 no-fuel emergency micro-miner pacing so primitive resource bootstrap costs painful time instead of early fuel logistics.
